mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED', ACTUAL_QUANTITY = #{actualQuantity}, ACTUAL_DATE = #{actualDate}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, COMPLETE_TIME = GETDATE(), COMPLETE_USER = #{completeUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING'

MERGE TBL_INV_PRODUCT AS target USING ( SELECT #{cmpyCd} as CMPY_CD, #{agntCd} as AGNT_CD, a.AGNT_NM as AGNT_NM, #{mtrlCd} as MTRL_CD, #{mtrlNm} as MTRL_NM, #{actualQuantity} as ACTUAL_QTY, #{completeUser} as COMPLETE_USER FROM TBL_AGENCY_M a WHERE a.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND a.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} ) AS source ON (target.CMPY_CD = source.CMPY_CD AND target.AGNT_CD = source.AGNT_CD AND target.MTRL_CD = source.MTRL_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CURRENT_QTY = CURRENT_QTY + source.ACTUAL_QTY, AGNT_NM = source.AGNT_NM, MTRL_CD = source.MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM = source.MTRL_NM, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = source.COMPLETE_USER WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, CURRENT_QTY, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER) VALUES (source.CMPY_CD, source.AGNT_CD, source.AGNT_NM, source.MTRL_CD, source.MTRL_NM, source.ACTUAL_QTY, GETDATE(), source.COMPLETE_USER, GETDATE(), source.COMPLETE_USER);

update.foreach: MERGE TBL_INV_PRODUCT AS target USING ( SELECT #{item.cmpyCd} as CMPY_CD, #{item.agntCd} as AGNT_CD, a.AGNT_NM as AGNT_NM, #{item.mtrlCd} as MTRL_CD, #{item.mtrlNm} as MTRL_NM, #{item.actualQuantity} as ACTUAL_QTY, #{item.completeUser} as COMPLETE_USER FROM TBL_AGENCY_M a WHERE a.AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND a.CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} ) AS source ON (target.CMPY_CD = source.CMPY_CD AND target.AGNT_CD = source.AGNT_CD AND target.MTRL_CD = source.MTRL_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CURRENT_QTY = CURRENT_QTY + source.ACTUAL_QTY, AGNT_NM = source.AGNT_NM, MTRL_CD = source.MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM = source.MTRL_NM, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = source.COMPLETE_USER WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, CURRENT_QTY, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER) VALUES (source.CMPY_CD, source.AGNT_CD, source.AGNT_NM, source.MTRL_CD, source.MTRL_NM, source.ACTUAL_QTY, GETDATE(), source.COMPLETE_USER, GETDATE(), source.COMPLETE_USER);
